'''zashobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphotone|kyphotone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphotone|kyphotone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zashobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæshebeth|zæshebeth]] || [[word:zæshebej|zæshebej]] || [[word:zæshebesh|zæshebesh]] || [[word:zæshebe|zæshebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashoshoboth|zashoshoboth]] || [[word:zashoshoboj|zashoshoboj]] || [[word:zashoshobosh|zashoshobosh]] || [[word:zashoshobo|zashoshobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashoboth|zashoboth]] || [[word:zashoboj|zashoboj]] || [[word:zashobosh|zashobosh]] || [[word:zashobo|zashobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashofboth|zashofboth]] || [[word:zashofboj|zashofboj]] || [[word:zashofbosh|zashofbosh]] || [[word:zashofbof|zashofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashobotho|zashobotho]] || [[word:zashobojo|zashobojo]] || [[word:zashobosho|zashobosho]] || [[word:zashoboko|zashoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashoboth|zashoboth]] || [[word:zashoboj|zashoboj]] || [[word:zashobosh|zashobosh]] || [[word:zashobo|zashobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashobothol|zashobothol]] || [[word:zashobojol|zashobojol]] || [[word:zashoboshol|zashoboshol]] || [[word:zashobokol|zashobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashobothotho|zashobothotho]] || [[word:zashobojojo|zashobojojo]] || [[word:zashoboshosho|zashoboshosho]] || [[word:zashoboko|zashoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashobothon|zashobothon]] || [[word:zashobojon|zashobojon]] || [[word:zashoboshon|zashoboshon]] || [[word:zashobokon|zashobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashobothoro|zashobothoro]] || [[word:zashobojoro|zashobojoro]] || [[word:zashoboshoro|zashoboshoro]] || [[word:zashobokoro|zashobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
